subject: Travel
body:
Hi
I am still in London waiting for the flight to prague at 2.45. I missed my morning connection because the first plane was so late.
I land at 5.45 and should be in the hotel by 7pm. It will be dark out so I can't see the apartments today. The real estate guy says it shouldn't be a problem to see them all tomorrow but If I don't also get to see petra's house and get everything else done tomorrow, should I change the flight to sunday ?

Regarding Petra's place..are you interested in buying the whole house or an apartment in the house ? The broker was talking about it as if you wanted the house..

Can I get you anything from London ? 


Xoxo
Nemo
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T
